payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: We're pre-recording an episode because at the time that the show happens next Thursday, we're going to be on an airplane going to aforementioned MCM London. We're taking a week off from the main storyline so that Laura Bailey can run her very first one-shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I think tomorrow is goat yoga.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Featuring Travis Willingham and friend of the show, TJ Storm. It's going to be fun. There's goats involved. There's yoga involved. We talk LA. It's great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll only say one word. Butts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Lots of butts.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There you go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Butts and taints.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Lots of butts. Lots of TJ Storm and lots of goat yoga tomorrow here at 7:00pm Pacific on twitch.tv/criticalrole. Check it out then. We are headed overseas next week to MCM London to come meet a bunch of you awesome European Critters.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (Australian accent) G'day mate!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: We're super excited about it. We'll be there on October 27th and October 28th. For more info, you can got to critrole.com. Last but not least, Laura Bailey is running a very special one-shot next Thursday.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my gosh, it's happening!

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Uk'otoa, once a creation of Zehir, the Cloaked Serpent god, now banished since the Calamity. This entity then began to build its own following, and the followers of Zehir, this old god, this once creator grew jealous and sealed it away. Now, Avantika, with your help, is working to begin to release these seals, bring it back, and as such, gain the blessings and boons of this entity. You decided to go into the jungle with her on this mission alongside an adventurer, a dungeoneer who had plotted out some of the path for you, named Jamedi. You had made your way through, avoiding hunting parties of lizard men being hunted by yuan-ti snake people. You made your way towards a mostly stone-crafted village in the center of this island that surrounded one large old temple. You snuck in, masquerading as some of these snake people and mostly succeeded, managed to sneak your way through part of the town, gathering some attention. You threw up some distracting illusions. You quickly killed off a few of them that had begun to grow wise to your presence, not being naturally wanted, and in the midst of the commotion, you raced up the steps of the temple, managed to kick one of the sentries off the side, found a way through the top, and closed it off, locking behind the very top of this five-sided pyramid. Now, once inside, you began to descend slowly down the curved stairs, but in missing a trap that was present, triggered it. The stairs went smooth, and the entire party slid down this slide, Goonies-style before impacting into the ground of one of the top chambers of the pyramid. Looking within the interior of this five-sided chamber, you noticed amongst the two pillars to the side a raised platform where there was a fountain of some kind surrounded by three of these mostly humanoid, but snake-scale-covered-in-places yuan-ti people and one with gray, armored, scaly skin, mostly human body though tall and lanky, and a head that was purely cobra-like. The hood exposed as all of them turn to your direction as you impact with the stone, and are made aware of your presence. With that, Mighty Nein, I would like for you to roll initiative. (exclamations)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be great.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Like ridiculously nervous.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do you know all the rules and stuff?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I know nothing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That's all you need.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's never played.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) You can check that out next Thursday, October 25th at this time, 7:00pm Pacific, in place of Critical Role on Geek & Sundry's Twitch, YouTube, and Alpha channels. I think that's the extent of our announcements for tonight. That brings us into the next episode of Critical Role!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yaas, yuan-ti! [TV static, click] [groovy Critical Role theme]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back everybody. Last we left off, The Mighty Nein had found their way south outside of the Empire on the coast of the Menagerie Coast, stolen a pirate ship, apparently. Following a thread to pursue aspects of the mystery of Fjord's background and the relationship to his mysterious patron, followed a mostly charred map to an island known as Urukaxl. Passing the dangerous reefs, you came upon the mother ship to the ship that you had stolen, known as the Squalleater, which was then, you realized, helmed by Captain Avantika, who gave you the option of either working with her under her guise as, essentially, currently captives and maybe eventually crewmen of the ship, or be killed and left in the harbor, held down with rocks and die. You took her up on the offer. You also discovered that she seems to be as enthralled with this same entity as Fjord is and has some sort of similar history with how this serpentine entity known as--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Uk'otoa.

preceding_turns.text: Uk'otoa. You remembered. Good job.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Uk'otoa!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was pretty cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wow!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's a good one.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to let the trees know that we're here.

payload.raw_text: As you're glancing around, the light orbs that are slowly drifting, they're leaving trails behind.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns_last5.text: Your eyes are like big black saucers.

preceding_turns_last5.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns_last5.text: Your eyes are normally like tea saucers, but now they're like full plates. Are you all right?

payload.speaker: MATT
payload.raw_text: Make a perception check with disadvantage. Well, with advantage because you have the torchlight on. Or no, sorry, regular roll. Brain working! It's been a week.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone turns slowly to Nott.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's like Rocket Raccoon going through the dimensional rifts.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's already a merry go round of lights going around Nott's head.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: It's like the sun in here.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This entire chamber is roughly 70-ish feet by about 50 feet in size. This orchard, these trees are everywhere.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Five-sided still?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, this chamber is four-sided, actually. It seems-- make an intelligence check, actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Natural 20.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Based on the shape of the temple as you saw it, the size of the chamber you were just in, and the chamber below, there should be more space on the sides and the front of it. It looks like this is probably a central chamber of this floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's 50 by 70.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we see any movement in here?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's 50 by 70.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Do we see any movement in here?

preceding_turns.text: Seems receptive.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Cool.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Jamedi, Captain, either of you know anything about these trees, or its fruit that grows in darkness?

payload.speaker: MATT

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (deep warped voice) What do you see?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: (gibberish)

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh! What, huh?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: What do you see?

preceding_turns.text: I see glowing symbols.

preceding_turns.text: Holy shit. But I can't see glowing symbols?

preceding_turns.text: They're so fucking bright!

preceding_turns.text: Can you draw them? What do they say?

preceding_turns.text: Wait, you can't see them?

preceding_turns.text: They look like that.

preceding_turns.text: You can't see this? You can see me, can't you?

preceding_turns.text: (screaming)
